parsed_output.justification: The transcript is heavily fragmented and ambiguous, making it impossible to reliably identify a single player as a werewolf. Statements about roles are contradictory and many participants are uncertain about each other’s alignments. No clear evidence that any one of the five players definitively holds a werewolf card. Therefore the safest action is to avoid eliminating anyone and vote Circle Vote.
